entries.source: She decided to move to Belgium.

entries.source: Currently Burj Khalifa is the tallest skyscraper in the world.

entries.source: The government should pay attention to the needs of the youth.
We wish you a happy Christmas and a happy New Year.

entries.source: The herd of zebras started fleeing when they saw the lions approaching.

entries.source: When your car suddenly breaks down, your first reaction is often to panic.
entries.reference: Uma imoto yakho yephuka ngokushesha, into yokuqala oyenzayo ukungenwa ingebhe.

entries.source: Can you find the signs for the mosque, the church and the synagogue?

entries.source: Aeroplanes are not usually allowed to fly through the zone above a city centre.

entries.source: We believe, as the Zulus say, that no elephant ever found its trunk too heavy.
entries.reference: Sikholwa ukuthi, njengoba kusho amaZulu, akukho ndlovu esindwa umboko wayo.

entries.source: He said that in his youth youngsters gave up their bus seats for the elderly.
entries.reference: Uthe ebusheni bakhe, abantu abancane babesukumela abantu abadala ebhasini ukuze bahlale.

entries.source: After a while you start reading with greater care and you realize the author’s true meaning.
entries.reference: Emuva kwesikhashana uqala ukufunda ngokucophelela okukhulu bese ubona okuqondwe umbhali.

entries.source: Because so many adults have passed away, young people and even children are forced to head up households.
entries.reference: Ngenxa yokuthi abantu abadala abaningi sebedlule emhlabeni, abantu abasebasha ngisho nezingane imbala baphoqeleka ukuthi baphathe imizi.

entries.source: This dictionary has been designed to help children in their first few years of learning English or IsiZulu as an additional language.
entries.reference: Lesi sichazamazwi senzelwe ukusiza izingane ezineminyaka ephansi, ezisaqala ukufunda isiNgisi noma isiZulu njengolimi olwengeziwe.
